name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.camera-switcher-tab
description: Display 1 UI tab for the VTuberSystemBase that manages render-output cameras (create / delete / select active), per-camera URP Local Volume override editing, named preset CRUD, and multi-camera preview. Provides the Contracts assembly (IPC topic constants, OSC address builder and payload DTOs) shared between the UI side and the main-output-side camera adapter, plus the UI implementation that consumes the ui-toolkit-shell facades. The main-output-side adapter (Unity Camera authoring + UCAPI/OSC reception) is out of scope for this package.
